---
title: "Contributing"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
author:
  - "Aleksandar Neshov"
  - "Dinh Marcus Nguyen"
  - "Alexander Toropov"
date: today
---

## Aleks
Drafted the initial project proposal
Conducted the first exploratory data analysis
Completed the analysis for Research Question 1, including data preparation, visualisation, and written interpretation

- Refactored the RQ1 scripts and fixed coding errors in the analysis pipeline

- Repository maintenance (`.gitignore` updates and cleanup of system files)

## Marcus

- Started the initial proposal draft (description and research questions)

- Renamed the dataset file and updated `.gitignore`

- Proposal updates, README updates, and data documentation (`data/README.qmd`)

- Set up the Quarto website structure, styling, homepage, and analysis page layout

- Configured GitHub Actions and GitHub Pages publishing workflow

- Set up the R environment with `renv` and project dependencies

- Implemented the data cleaning pipeline and `load_data.r` script

- Completed Research Question 2: data preparation, recovery trend visualisations, linear models (international, domestic, and combined), and written analysis

- Ensured consistent plot styling across RQ2 trend lines

## Alex
